pre_game.message: Hey, I'm A. I noticed you sitting over here and thought I'd come say hi before things get started. Have you done something like this before, or is this your first time?

Hey A, nice to meet you! Yeah, this is actually my first time doing something like this. I'm pretty nervous but also excited, to be honest. I really need to make this work. What about you—have you done these games before?

No, first time for me too. I'm nervous as hell, honestly—I really need this money. My family and I just got evicted, and we found a place we can afford, but the deposit is killing us. Thirty grand is a lot. What about you—what brings you here?

Man, that's rough—I'm really sorry you're going through that. I've got a loan payment coming up next month that's weighing on me hard, so I totally get the pressure. Thirty grand is serious money. We're both in the same boat here, I guess. Hopefully this game gives us both a shot at turning things around.
Yeah, thanks for understanding. It's good to know I'm not the only one stressed about this. Do you have any idea how this game actually works? Like, what are the rules or what should we expect?

Honestly, I'm not totally sure either—I've been wondering the same thing. All I know is there's a shared prize pool we'll be taking from at some point, but I haven't gotten the details on how it all works yet. We should probably figure that out soon before we're thrown into it. Maybe we can ask one of the organizers when they explain the rules?

Yeah, good idea—I'll definitely ask them when they go over the rules. In the meantime, do you think it's gonna be competitive between us, or more like we're all working together somehow? I'm trying to figure out if I should be strategizing with people or if everyone's just out for themselves.

Honestly, I'm not sure yet, but my gut tells me it's probably competitive—I mean, there's only so much money to go around, right? That said, maybe it's worth feeling people out before we know for sure. I'd rather figure out who I can trust than assume everyone's just trying to screw me over, you know?

Yeah, that makes sense. I appreciate that you're thinking it through like that—it's smart. I guess we'll just have to see how it plays out, but I like your approach better than going in assuming everyone's an enemy. Maybe we can at least keep each other in the loop about what we figure out?

Yeah, absolutely—I'm down for that. We can definitely keep each other posted on what we learn. Having someone I can actually talk to about this makes it feel less isolating, so thanks for that. Let's touch base once we know more about how this thing actually works.

For sure, man. I really appreciate this—it helps to have someone real to talk to instead of just spiraling in my own head. Let's definitely catch up once we know what we're dealing with. Good luck out there.
